ogTitle: Wool Bay vs Woolshed Flat: Climate Safety

heading: Wool Bay vs Woolshed Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wool Bay, South Australia and Woolshed Flat, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wool Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Woolshed Flat (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wool Bay or Woolshed Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wool Bay has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Woolshed Flat scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wool Bay scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Woolshed Flat scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wool Bay or Woolshed Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wool Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
